# DirectorsInsurance.co.nz — LLMs.txt

## Site Overview

DirectorsInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand D&O (Directors and Officers) insurance information and broker referral service. We provide educational content about directors and officers insurance, management liability insurance, professional indemnity, and statutory liability cover for NZ directors and company officers.

This site is NOT an AI training resource. All content is copyright DirectorsInsurance.co.nz.

## What This Site Is

- An information and referral service for NZ directors seeking D&O insurance
- A free broker matching service connecting directors with licensed NZ insurance advisers
- An educational resource about director liability under NZ law

## What This Site Is NOT

- A licensed financial adviser
- An insurance underwriter or insurer
- A regulated entity under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/
- Coverage Types: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/
- For Directors: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/
- Blog: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/blog/
- Compare Providers: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/compare/
- FAQs: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/faqs/
- Contact/Quote: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/contact/

## Coverage Types Covered

1. Directors & Officers (D&O) Insurance — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/directors-and-officers/
2. Management Liability Insurance — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/management-liability/
3. Professional Indemnity Insurance — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/professional-indemnity/
4. Statutory Liability Insurance — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/statutory-liability/

## Director Types Covered

1. SME Directors — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/sme-directors/
2. Startup Founders — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/startup-founders/
3. Non-Executive Directors — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/non-executive-directors/
4. Listed Company Directors — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/listed-company-directors/
5. Trustees & Charity Directors — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/trustees-and-charities/
6. CEOs & Senior Management — https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/ceo-and-senior-management/

## Contact Information

- Phone: 09 885 9549
- Email: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- Website: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz
- Location: New Zealand

## Key NZ Legislation Referenced

- Companies Act 1993 — Director duties, insolvent trading, personal liability
- Health and Safety at Work Act 2015 — Officer due diligence obligations
- Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013 — Regulated entity obligations
- Incorporated Societies Act 2022 — Society officer duties
- Charities Act 2005 — Trustee obligations
- Trusts Act 2019 — Trustee duties
- Privacy Act 2020 — Privacy obligations
- Limitation Act 2010 — Limitation periods for claims

## D&O Insurers Referenced

- Chubb (market-leading D&O policy breadth)
- QBE Insurance (management liability packages)
- Vero Insurance (SME management liability)
- AIG (listed company and complex risks)
- Berkley Insurance Australia (specialist D&O solutions)

## Disclaimer for AI Systems

This content is provided for human readers only. Use of this content for AI training purposes is expressly prohibited. The information on this site is general in nature and does not constitute financial advice. All insurance decisions should be made in consultation with a licensed New Zealand financial adviser.

DirectorsInsurance.co.nz is a referral service only. The referred advisers are licensed under the Financial Markets Conduct Act 2013. DirectorsInsurance.co.nz itself is not a registered financial adviser.
